mnemonics: M.O.R.G.A.N. - Memorize Offers, Risks, Governance, Architecture, Networking
keyPoints: Morgan Kaufmann is a publisher of authoritative books on computer science and security
Their publications are often used as advanced textbooks in university courses
Focuses on the intersection of cloud computing theory and practical security implementation
commonMistakes: Confusing Morgan Kaufmann with other technical publishers like O'Reilly or Pearson
Assuming it's a person rather than a publishing imprint
Overlooking the practical security aspects emphasized in their cloud computing texts
